code:
%% Effort Status Workflow
%% State machine for status transitions

stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> Draft: Create asset

    Draft --> Backlog: Move to Backlog
    Draft --> Trashed: Trash

    Backlog --> Draft: Move to Draft
    Backlog --> Analysis: Move to Analysis
    Backlog --> Doing: Start (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)
    Backlog --> Trashed: Trash

    Analysis --> Backlog: Move to Backlog
    Analysis --> ToDo: Move to ToDo
    Analysis --> Trashed: Trash

    ToDo --> Analysis: Move to Analysis
    ToDo --> Doing: Start
    ToDo --> Trashed: Trash

    Doing --> Backlog: Move to Backlog (HealthTech_PatientRecords)
    Doing --> ToDo: Move to ToDo (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
    Doing --> Done: Mark Done
    Doing --> Trashed: Trash

    Done --> Doing: Reopen
    Done --> Trashed: Trash

    Trashed --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]: Terminal state

    note right of Draft
        Initial state
        No timestamps
    end note

    note right of Doing
        Sets: ems__Effort_startTimestamp
        On exit: ems__Effort_endTimestamp
    end note

    note right of Done
        Sets: ems__Effort_resolutionTimestamp
        Completion state
    end note

    note right of Trashed
        Terminal state
        Can't transition further
        Archived but kept for audit
    end note
repo_description: Cognitive infrastructure augmenting human intelligence through semantic knowledge organization, SPARQL queries, ontology-driven reasoning, and AI integration. Obsidian plugin + CLI + Core library.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech诊断引擎设计一个完整的工作流状态机。核心是从DiagnosticEngine创建资产开始，进入Draft状态，然后可以流向Backlog、Analysis这些分析阶段，最终到Done或者Trashed。关键是Doing状态要能记录ems_Effort的时间戳。
明白了。我注意到Doing状态涉及两个系统交互——Backlog的转移要关联HealthTech_PatientRecords，ToDo的转移要关联HealthTech_EMR_Sync。这两个系统约束是硬性规则还是可选的？
是硬性规则。PatientRecords和EMR_Sync的集成是合规要求。另外，Trashed是终态，要指向HealthTech_LabAnalyzer做归档审计，不能再转出。
好的，主干结构已搭建。Draft作为初始态无时间戳；Doing状态设置ems_Effort_startTimestamp，退出时设置endTimestamp；Done设置resolutionTimestamp。Trashed标注为终态不可再转移。
等等，Analysis和ToDo之间的双向流转确认一下——Analysis可以进ToDo，ToDo也能退回Analysis，对吧？有些团队希望严格单向。
确认是双向的。当前设计：Analysis -- ToDo是"Move to ToDo"，ToDo -- Analysis是"Move to Analysis"。如果需要改为单向，我可以调整。
双向保留，实际工作中确实需要回退。补充一个细节：Done状态要支持Reopen回到Doing，这个别漏了。
已添加Done到Doing的Reopen转移。所有终态约束检查完毕：Draft、Backlog、Analysis、ToDo、Doing都能进Trashed；Trashed只能到LabAnalyzer终止。四个状态注释也已就位。
